question:
[PICTURE REQUIRED]
The graph above shows the number of coffee shops in four districts. Districts A and B each have 120 patrons per coffee shop. Districts C and D each have 80 patrons per coffee shop. Which of the districts has the greatest number of coffee shop patrons?

solution.strategy: Multiply each district's number of coffee shops by its patrons per shop; the district with the largest product has the greatest number of patrons.
